title: Sunrise Bakery Standing-Order Grid: Spoilage-Free Activation
strategies: single delivery window (t=0) baseline: activate one whole window, corner-free by construction (reproduces the checker baseline B=m)
lexicographic greedy: sweep slots in (w,t) order, activate each slot whose addition creates no spoilage cascade with the already-chosen set
seeded multi-restart randomized greedy: run the validity-guarded greedy under many shuffled priority orders and keep the largest corner-free set
priority heuristics that bias the ordering (diagonal-first / low-density-window-first) or add deterministic local-search swaps to push past plain greedy
